agent_harness.definition: A product agent is model + harness: model client, loop policy, tools/evaluators, artifact store, budgets, traces, and stopping rules.
agent_harness.parallelism_policy: The orchestrator may fan out role agents or variant evaluations with asyncio.gather when task dependencies allow it.

prd.goal: Run the prediction-market challenge locally when the upstream official scorer is not required
notes: This file is the run-local PRD/task map.
Use organized_tasks for the ordered work plan, status, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.

acceptance_criteria: Explicit mode or auto-router selected optimization-query exploration
A task ingestion decision was persisted
The `challenge` product agent was selected

acceptance_criteria: The agent harness ran a query-research loop before optimization

OptimizationQueryLoop scored query variants for evidence and implementability

acceptance_criteria: Top query findings were summarized

acceptance_criteria: If evaluator exists, optimize/code variants were evaluated

Challenge agents may additionally emit a runnable solution artifact for official grading

acceptance_criteria: Final report included query findings and optimizer seed context

plan.goal: Run the prediction-market challenge locally when the upstream official scorer is not required
search_angles: AMM LMSR entropy and scoring-rule literature
adverse selection arbitrage inventory and risk controls
stopping_signals: no meaningful new sources after N cycles
critic finds no new major objections
plan.strategy: Ground the challenge in prediction-market and market-making literature before optimizing strategy code.

ralph_loop.completion_rule: All organized_tasks must have passes=true. Explicit objective targets, such as profit_usd, keep optimizer tasks incomplete until reached.
ralph_loop.definition: PRD-driven long-running loop: persist tasks in prd.json, append progress.txt, run fresh loop iterations, and stop only when PRD items pass or the iteration budget is reached.

judge_rubric.name: citation_accuracy
judge_rubric.question: Do cited sources support the cited claims?

judge_rubric.name: source_quality
judge_rubric.question: Were primary or authoritative sources preferred?

judge_rubric.name: tool_efficiency
judge_rubric.question: Were the right tools used a reasonable number of times?

responsibilities: decompose the question into independent directions
fan out subagent searches in parallel when directions are independent
start with broad landscape queries before narrowing
merge evidence and route weak spots to critic or follow-up search

subagents.parallelism: asyncio.gather over independent search agents or query variants
subagents.search_policy: start wide, evaluate source yield, then progressively narrow
